heroTitle: What is my car worth? Get a free valuation
heroDesc: Get a free instant car valuation based on market value. Enter your license plate and see what your car is worth.
step_1_desc: Just type in your license plate – takes two seconds.
step_2_desc: We pull up your car and gather the key details.
step_3_desc: Autoværdi crunches the numbers and gives you a realistic idea of what your car is worth right now.
footer_dealers_desc: We offer implementation of our price valuation widget on your website, so your customers can quickly get a price overview. Additionally, we have a sniping tool that provides notifications for underpriced cars from Danish marketplaces.
footer_api_desc: Are you a developer? You can get access to our API, which includes endpoints for statistics and ML within used cars.
footer_tagline: Precise car valuations. Ready to trade with confidence.
search_error: An error occurred. Please try again later.
search_advanced_desc: A more accurate valuation based on additional details about your car
search_disclaimer: Note: This tool is only a guide based on similar cars on the market. You should always do your own research before buying or selling.
advanced_desc: Get a more accurate valuation by providing additional details about your car
advanced_login_required: You need to be logged in to use advanced valuation
account_toggle_login: Already have an account? Log in
account_toggle_register: Don't have an account? Register now
seo_car_worth_p1: When you ask "what is my car worth?", the answer is not always straightforward. The value of your car depends on several factors: make, model, year, mileage, equipment level, and not least the car's overall condition. At Autoværdi, we make it easy to get an answer to exactly that question. Our advanced algorithm analyzes current market values from Danish car dealers and private sales, so you get a realistic estimate of your car's value.
seo_how_to_title: How to find out what your car is worth
seo_how_to_p1: It only takes 10 seconds to get a free valuation. Enter your license plate in the field above, and our system automatically finds all information about your car. Then we calculate an accurate valuation based on thousands of comparable car sales in Denmark.
seo_why_title: Why choose Autoværdi for your car valuation?
seo_free: Completely free car valuation with no hidden fees
seo_fast: Results in seconds based on market value
seo_data: Data based on real sales prices from Danish car markets
seo_advanced: Advanced algorithms that account for year, model, and condition
blog_subtitle: Guides, tips and advice on car valuation and selling used cars.
blog_post1_title: What is my car worth? The Complete Guide 2026

blog_post2_desc: Learn how to value your car by analyzing the market and taking important factors into account.
